Think modern False Nines are revolutionary?

Nándor Hidegkuti was doing it for Hungary in the 50s! Tearing England apart at Wembley with no traditional striker. Pure tactical genius, decades ahead. The blueprint was already drawn!

#FootballHistory #TacticalEvolution #GoldenTeam #Hungary #FootballFacts
